service.description: The name of the service these settings apply to.

network_settings.description: Ingress settings for this service. Will apply to all versions. Structure is [documented below](#nested_network_settings).

ingress_traffic_allowed.description: The ingress settings for version or service. Default value is `INGRESS_TRAFFIC_ALLOWED_UNSPECIFIED`. Possible values are: `INGRESS_TRAFFIC_ALLOWED_UNSPECIFIED`, `INGRESS_TRAFFIC_ALLOWED_ALL`, `INGRESS_TRAFFIC_ALLOWED_INTERNAL_ONLY`, `INGRESS_TRAFFIC_ALLOWED_INTERNAL_AND_LB`.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
